name: Movie Park Germany
formerNames: Kirchhellener Märchenwald  Traumlandpark  Das Neue Traumland  Bavaria Filmpark Bottrop  Warner Bros. Movie World Germany
description: Movie Park Germany is a theme park in Bottrop-Kirchhellen in western Germany, 50 km north of Düsseldorf, with an area of 40 ha.  It consists of 7 areas based on movies and TV series.  Nearby the park are several film studios.
